body:
## Summary

Adds comprehensive version reporting for all preinstalled software missing from the `/version` Telegram bot command output, based on a full audit of all 4 Dockerfiles in the image stack.

### Iteration 1 (initial)
- **Browsers** (new section): Google Chrome, Chromium, Firefox, Microsoft Edge
- **Browser Automation** (new section): Playwright Test, Playwright MCP, Puppeteer Browsers
- **Language Runtimes** (new sections): Ruby/rbenv, Kotlin, Swift, R
- **Development Tools**: GitLab CLI (glab), NASM, FASM, wget, screen
- **Reorganized sections**: Moved Playwright from "Development Tools" to dedicated "Browser Automation" section; renamed "C/C++" to "C/C++/Assembly" with NASM/FASM

### Iteration 2 (PR feedback)
- **Playwright MCP status in Claude Code**: Shows whether Playwright MCP is successfully connected and active via `claude mcp list` (displays "connected" or "not configured")
- **WebKit browser**: Detects installed Playwright WebKit browser from cache directory
- **Additional dev tools**: cURL, Zip, Unzip, Expect, Xvfb — all preinstalled in the sandbox/essentials Docker layers
- **Updated case study**: Extended gap analysis table with all newly added entries

### Changes

| File | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `src/version-info.lib.mjs` | Added 21 new `VERSION_COMMANDS` entries (including `playwrightMcpStatus`), updated `getVersionInfo()` return object, updated `formatVersionMessage()` with WebKit in Browsers, MCP status in Browser Automation, new tools in Development Tools |
| `tests/version-info.test.mjs` | 22 tests covering all sections, conditional display, section ordering, MCP status, and key presence |
| `docs/case-studies/issue-1506/` | Case study with complete gap analysis of Dockerfile stack vs `/version` output |

### Dockerfile Stack Audit

Compared all software installed across the 4 Dockerfiles (sandbox-js, essentials-sandbox, full-sandbox, hive-mind) against `/version` output to identify gaps. Full analysis in case study.

Fixes #1506

## Test plan

- [x] All 22 unit tests pass (`node tests/version-info.test.mjs`)
- [x] Prettier formatting passes
- [ ] Verify `/version` output in production Docker container shows browser versions
- [ ] Verify Playwright MCP status shows "connected" when configured in Claude Code
- [ ] Verify browser automation tools appear in dedicated section
- [ ] Verify new language runtimes (Ruby, Kotlin, Swift, R) appear when installed
- [ ] Verify new dev tools (curl, zip, unzip, expect, xvfb) appear when installed

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
title: feat: add browsers, browser tools, and missing software to /version command
